name: Coil
description: Colour-wheel rings with a hollow hub, the coil re-winding to a new angle on each redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 90%; height: 90%; margin: 5%; border-radius: 50%; background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)), @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)), @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5))); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 34%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color0); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
